## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (and new behavior is covered by a test)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint` pass
- [ ] If the public API changed: `npm run build && npm run check:exports` passes
- [ ] Added a changeset (`npm run changeset`) for any user-facing change
- [ ] Secrets are never logged (output goes through `redact` / `redactString`)
